# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

```typescript
import { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from '@vercel/node';

export default async function (req: VercelRequest, res: VercelResponse) {
  if (req.method === 'POST') {
    const body = await new Promise<string>((resolve, reject) => {
      let data = '';
      req.on('data', chunk => (data += chunk));
      req.on('end', () => resolve(data));
      req.on('error', err => reject(err));
    });
    
    const headers: Record<string, string> = {};
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(req.headers)) {
      if (typeof value === 'string') {
        headers[key] = value;
      } else if (Array.isArray(value)) {
        // If there are multiple values for a single header key, join them with commas
        headers[key] = value.join(',');
      }
    }
    
    res.set(headers);
    
    const reader = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        controller.enqueue(body);
        controller.close();
      },
    });
    
    return new Response(reader, { status: 200 }).pipe(res);
  } else {
    res.status(405).send('Method Not Allowed');
 <｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>}
